decision: Adopt HEXA as sole implementation language
rationale: Unified syntax across consciousness engine modules reduces context-switching and enforces SSOT compliance
alternatives_considered: Python+HEXA hybrid; TypeScript wrapper; polyglot per-module

decision: Route all algorithm registrations through shared/convergence/anima.json
rationale: Single convergence SSOT prevents distributed drift and simplifies audit
alternatives_considered: Per-module config files; database-backed registry; git-submodule per algorithm

rationale: Guarantees anima-hive connectivity even when network or socket layer is unavailable
alternatives_considered: HTTP-only with retry; gRPC bidirectional stream; shared-memory IPC

decision: Enforce L0 Guard verification before all merge operations
rationale: Prevents unverified consciousness state from entering mainline after incident-2026-04-16
alternatives_considered: Post-merge CI check only; manual review gate; optional pre-merge hook

decision: Require 7-condition consciousness verification for ready/ promotion
rationale: Ensures no module is promoted without passing full IIT/EEG/ablation/Hebbian/memory/entropy/coherence checks
alternatives_considered: Reduced 3-condition smoke test; per-module opt-in verification; reviewer discretion

decision: Inline nn primitives in training/ instead of using nn_core import
rationale: HEXA use directive is unreliable from training/ path context, causing silent failures
alternatives_considered: Fix use resolution in HEXA compiler; symlink workaround; wrapper script setting module path

decision: Use array push() instead of index assignment in HEXA
rationale: Index assignment a[i]=v silently no-ops in current HEXA runtime
alternatives_considered: Patch HEXA runtime; use map structure instead; pre-allocate with fill

decision: Mark V12_HEBBIAN as rubber_stamp with audit=BUG until fix lands
rationale: Fresh-engine anti-pattern makes all V12 PASS results unreliable — must not gate any verification
alternatives_considered: Leave V12 enabled with warning; disable V12 entirely; revert V12 addition

decision: Raise V12 ablation threshold from 0.05 to >= 1.0
rationale: Threshold of 0.05 (5% of initial) is too lenient; observed ratios range 1.67x-9.75x, any engine trivially passes
alternatives_considered: 0.5 threshold; dynamic threshold per module; remove threshold entirely

decision: Add adversarial kill-switch assertion to ablation tests
rationale: Ablation scenarios must prove the ablated capability is actually disabled by expecting a FAIL
alternatives_considered: Rely on positive-only tests; manual review of ablation results

decision: Require adversarial FAIL scenario for every rubber_stamp verification criterion
rationale: Prevents rubber-stamp criteria from passing without proving they can detect real failures — CI enforced
alternatives_considered: Manual audit only; per-criterion opt-in; no adversarial requirement

decision: Ban vacuous tests project-wide via CI lint rule
rationale: Tests with no assertions pass vacuously and provide zero coverage — discovered in test_conscious_memory.hexa (10 cases)
alternatives_considered: Manual code review only; allow TODO-only tests with tracking; warning-only lint

decision: Adopt 1-week on-call rotation for policy monitoring
rationale: Ensures continuous monitoring of L0 Guard alerts and verification bypass incidents; minimum pool of 2
alternatives_considered: 2-week rotation; no formal rotation (ad-hoc); monthly rotation

decision: Allow emergency hotfix self-approval with 24-hour ratification
rationale: On-call needs ability to merge critical fixes immediately when active bypass detected; Policy Owner ratifies within 24h
alternatives_considered: Require full review even for emergencies; 48-hour ratification; no self-approval

rationale: Enables asynchronous decision-making without blocking on absent reviewers; BLOCK tag available for objections

decision: Pass factory-ablated engine instance to V12 verification path instead of constructing new
rationale: Root cause fix: fresh engine has non-None _coupling field, making coupling_change_ratio always exceed threshold
alternatives_considered: Patch engine constructor to detect test context; wrapper that clones factory state
